findings.finding: The scene 'scene-notice' (01-notice.md) introduces material claims regarding the distinction between observation and explanation (claim-observation-explanation) and the existence of multiple scientific methods (claim-multiple-scientific-methods), which are mapped to it in claims.json. However, it entirely omits the required learner-visible {source-note} block, creating an evidence gap according to the content standard.
findings.resolution: Add a {source-note} block to the end of 01-notice.md that includes ':claims: claim-observation-explanation, claim-empirical-question, claim-multiple-scientific-methods' and ':sources: source-nrc-framework', along with a brief explanation of how the source supports these claims.

findings.finding: The lesson precisely and correctly distinguishes between questions (which are empirically answerable) and hypotheses/claims (which are falsifiable), avoiding the common epistemological error of treating questions as falsifiable statements.

limitations: Did not independently review K-12 curriculum alignment beyond the single provided NRC Framework source.
